title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for a device that is not currently connected
scenario: Fit Test page should not be displayed or accessible when viewing onboarding user guides for a device that is not currently connected.
steps: 1. Start the app with any device connected.
2. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides.
3. Click on a device in the Onboarding section that is not currently connected.
expected: Fit Test page is not displayed as part of the onboarding screens, and it should not be possible to start the Fit Test for a device that is not connected.
